name: Alex Johnson
bio: We met in university and still talk about old campus stories. Alex loves road trips and always plans the next weekend escape.

name: Sarah Khan
bio: Sarah was my first team lead at work. She gives the best career advice and never forgets to ask how things are going.

name: Maya Chen
bio: Maya and I swap book recommendations every month. She is the friend who always remembers birthdays before anyone else.

name: David Miller
bio: David has been around since school days. We mostly catch up over fitness goals and football highlights.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: Nadia grew up two houses away from me. Even when life gets busy, she is still the easiest person to talk to.

name: Ryan Lopez
bio: Ryan and I met through online games and somehow became real-life friends. He checks in with funny voice notes all the time.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Emma is a designer friend who always shares cool ideas and side project inspiration. Our chats usually turn into creative brainstorming.

name: Farhan Ahmed
bio: Farhan is the friend I meet for cafe catch-ups and startup talk. He is always building something new and wants honest feedback.
